entries.text:
[TODO: draft]

Titania said she saw Cressida holding the cookies ~15 minutes before I asked — close to my estimated time of death.

[TODO: draft]

Miranda says she left the cookies outside Cressida's door; no answer, and she wasn't brave enough to knock twice.

[TODO: draft]

Scene notes: body was face-down first; purple pool underneath hadn't reached the neck yet — frontal wound mattered once turned.

[TODO: add real intel here]

Autopsy note (VN): wound favors frontal penetration—the hole wasn't visible while the body lay face-down, so whatever struck didn't punch cleanly through the back.
Plain room: bed in the corner, single doorway to the corridor. It's directly across from my cabin on the same hall.
Stained decorative foil wrappers lie scattered on the bed and floor.
The door to the victim's room has stayed open at least since I woke up. No signs of tampering or forced entry.
There are no name plaques, labels, or any identifying features around the doors that would denote their occupants.

[TODO: draft]

Assume my door and the victim's match the same ship design.

[TODO: draft]

From inside my room → hall opens the door; from hall → stepping back in closes it behind me.

[TODO: draft]

Hypothesis: doors mainly respond to their registered occupant — still doesn't explain victim's door stuck open.
Every member of the crew has a synthetic body. These bodies work exactly like human ones, except for a few differences, like how we bleed purple blood.

[TODO: draft]

Ship backup standard Stephano gave: snapshots every minute. Any memory between last backup and death is lost forever.

[TODO: add real intel here]

Grid: each column is a ship-day. Day 2 highlights [[detective]], [[titania]], [[stephano]], [[miranda]], and [[cressida]] as active — links tie this sheet to the crew dossiers.
[TODO: add real intel here] Placeholder tie-in for Miranda's chocolates / galley trail.

[TODO: draft]

Miranda's cookies — neat foil wrap. Titania produced them mid-interview and handed them to me; same batch Miranda claims she left outside [[cressida]]'s door.
